title: GabeUp's Super Pack
description: Combined with Palladium, GabeUp's Super Pack provides a unique RPG-like experience with superheroes and superpowers in Minecraft!
body:
What used to be an FSang18's Addon Extension, is now its own fully standalone Mod Addon that adds entirely new RPG-like systems that will continue to grow and develop with my own coding ability! In this Mod Addon, you will be able to obtain a variety of powers either though natural birth circumstances, or by gaining them later in life!

## **《✨Available Powers⚡️》**

**Daxamite (DC)
Strontian (Marvel)
Werewolf (Marvel)
Immortality (Vandal Savage | DC) 
Immortal (Invincible)
Atomic Physiology (Albert Pratt | DC)
Atomic Physiology (Atom Smasher | DC)
Ray Seafolk (Custom)
Octopus Seafolk (Custom)
Pseudo-Vampire (Morbius | Marvel)
Indestructible Skin (Luke Cage | Marvel)
Lizard Mutate (Curt Connors | Marvel)
Superhuman Muscle Mutation (Thunderbird | X-Men)
Superhuman Combat Mutation (Warpath | X-Men)
Bodily Mass Mutation (Blob | X-Men)**



## **〘💪New Stat & Genetics System🧬〙**

In the 2.0 update of GabeUp's Super Pack, there was a massive change to the progression and power system over all! Now, with any power, including the new Powerless "power" that you start with, will have a fully functioning RPG-like stat screen when you open the power menu for that specific power. The current stats that are available are STR (Strength), DEX (Dexterity), CON (Constitution), AGI (Agility), FOC (Focus), and WIL (Willpower). Each of these provide their own unique bonuses to the character for a unique playstyle! 



**⟩ STR : The amount of melee damage you do.**

**⟩ DEX : The amount of physical damage you take that can be reduced & melee attack speed.**

**⟩ CON : The amount of maximum health that you can possess.**

**⟩ AGI : How fast you can go on land, in the air (flying), and in the water (swimming).**

**⟩ FOC : Increases XP Gain.**

**⟩ WIL : Increases Non Physical Damage Dealt & Reduces Non Physical Damage Taken. (Config file for specifying non physical damage types).**

➤ This pairs in with our new custom XP system, completely different from base Minecraft! By default, there is a chance that you will gain a small amount of experience every time you punch an entity. When you kill an enemy, mine an ore, or use certain machines, you will gain guaranteed XP (Amounts can be Increases with certain Traits, Powers, or FOC Stat). With each level you will gain 1 Skill Point, you can put it into any one of your stats to increase your power, with a maximum level of 160! (Powerless is capped at 100 & with lower stat caps).

➤ Some powers you will notice, like Daxamite, Strontian, Seafolk, and the Mutant powers, are no longer obtainable in survival. This is because of the new genetic lottery system added to the Mod Addon! When you spawn into the world, you will be able to press a keybind to bring up the Character Sheet Menu. You will by default have 3 Genetic Rolls that you can use to roll for a specific genetic power! Most commonly, you will get Powerless Human, and the Aliens such as Daxamite and Strontian are the rarest due to their inherent power. Fret not, for Humans may not be the strongest inherently, they do have the most potential! As a human, you will be able to craft certain powers and gain them in survival, whereas those who roll a genetic power, are stuck with them unless they will for a different one. (Some give and take). 

➤ Another part of the Character Sheet is the Trait system as well! This also goes off of Genetic Rolls, and with each power, including Human, you will be able to roll for a specific trait randomly, these will vary in rarity and power, each trait most commonly having a strength and a drawback to it, some do not, and those are typically ones you want to go for. However, for specific builds, you may want to go for one that has a drawback because of the bigger bonus it could give you in that one department. 

➤ Genetic Rolls can most commonly be gained by leveling up! Every 10 levels, you will gain 1 Genetic Roll that you can put towards a Race Reroll, or a Trait Reroll. Another way to get Genetic Rolls is by fighting bosses that can randomly spawn in your world! As of right now we have 4 overworld bosses that scale with your level, so be sure to take them on for a reward, and some XP! 





##      **「🤖Dependencies Required📝」**
     
 
PlayerAnimator

Palladium

KubeJS

Curios API (Forge/NeoForge)

Pehkui

GeckoLib

Packet Fixer

Pantheon Sent
